calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

HEARING ON APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for entry of judgment in accordance with the settlement agreement attached as Exhibit A to the Noel Declaration is granted. Plaintiff shall provide a proposed judgment for the principal sum of $37,763.30, interest in the amount of $2,131.30, and costs in the amount of $955.00, for a total judgment of $40,849.60.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
